_comment: Copy to ~/.claude/.mcp.json. Export EXA_API_KEY in ~/.zshrc (see SETUP-GUIDE Step 4). Keep this lean — Claude Code already has native file, search, and reasoning tools, and GitHub + live docs come from plugins (github, context7), not MCP entries. Keep under ~6 MCPs to preserve the context window.

exa.description: Exa AI neural search — deep web research, code context, academic search. Reads EXA_API_KEY from your shell. Hosted alternative: replace this block with { "type": "http", "url": "https://mcp.exa.ai/mcp", "headers": { "x-api-key": "${EXA_API_KEY}" } }

fetch.description: Fetch and read a specific URL as clean markdown. Complements Exa: Exa finds pages, fetch reads them in full.
